executives.name: Adaire Fox-Martin
executives.background: Adaire Fox-Martin has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer since June 2024. Prior to joining Equinix, she served as President of Google Cloud Go-to-Market and Head of Google Ireland from July 2021 to June 2024. Before Google, she had a 13-year career at SAP, where she held various leadership roles, including Executive Board Member and President of Global Customer Success.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Keith Taylor
executives.background: Keith D. Taylor has served as our Chief Financial Officer since September 2005. He joined Equinix in 1999 and has held various roles including Director of Finance and Administration, and Vice President, Finance and Chief Accounting Officer.

executives.name: Raouf Abdel
executives.background: Raouf Abdel has served as our Executive Vice President, Global Operations since 2018. He joined Equinix in 2012 and previously served as Regional Head of Operations, Americas.

executives.name: Justin Dustzadeh
executives.background: Justin Dustzadeh has served as our Chief Technology Officer since 2019. Prior to joining Equinix, he held technology leadership roles at Visa, Huawei, and Ericsson.

executives.name: Brandi Galvin Morandi
executives.background: Brandi Galvin Morandi has served as our Chief Legal and Human Resources Officer and Secretary since 2019. She joined Equinix in 2003 and has served as General Counsel since 2003.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Legal and Human Resources Officer

executives.name: Charles Meyers
executives.background: Charles Meyers served as our President and CEO from 2018 to 2024 and transitioned to Executive Chairman in June 2024.

tenure_dates.title: President of Strategy, Services, and Innovation

executives.name: Christopher Paisley
executives.background: Christopher Paisley has served as a Dean's Executive Professor of Accounting and Finance at Santa Clara University since 2001.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors / Lead Independent Director

executives.name: Christopher Sharp
executives.background: Mr. Sharp has served as our Chief Technology Officer since 2015. Prior to joining Digital Realty, he held leadership positions at Equinix.

executives.name: Olivier Leonetti
executives.background: Olivier Leonetti is Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Eaton. He joined Eaton in 2024. Prior to joining Eaton, he served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Johnson Controls International plc from 2020 to 2024. He also served as CFO of Zebra Technologies and Western Digital.

executives.name: Peter Van Camp
executives.background: Peter Van Camp has served as Executive Chairman since 2007. He previously served as our CEO from 2000 to 2007.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Executive Officer, President, Executive Chairman

executives.name: Rebecca Kujawa
executives.background: Ms. Kujawa is President, NextEra Energy Resources, LLC. She previously served as executive vice president, finance and CFO of NextEra Energy and as vice president, business management for NextEra Energy Resources.

executives.name: Sandra Rivera
executives.background: Sandra Rivera is the CEO of Altera, an Intel Company. She previously served as Executive Vice President at Intel.

executives.name: Scott Kriens
executives.background: Mr. Kriens has served as Chairman of the Board since 1996. He served as our CEO from 1996 to 2008.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Thomas Olinger
executives.background: Thomas Olinger was the CFO of Prologis, Inc. from 2012 to 2022.
